caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt and white headphones is shown in a small video overlay in the lower-left corner, reacting with an open-mouthed expression while playing a football video game. The main screen displays a wide view of a stadium during a game of "MADDEN 23", with a scoreboard showing "BUF 6" and "EXO 7" during the "2nd" quarter with "2:25" remaining and "35" seconds on the play clock. The text "SPECIAL TEAMS" is prominent at the bottom, and a notification reads "SAVE RAINDS Players like a little jab holding onto the ball". To the right of the person's overlay, there is a tactical menu offering options for "RETURN MIDDLE" and "RETURN RIGHT". Across the frames, the person's facial expression shifts slightly, and a small movement occurs in the background of the game field, while the overall layout and on-screen statistics remain constant.
